# botyard_skill (Data Source)

Looks up a single skill from the organization's skill catalogue by slug, exposing its `id` for use with `botyard_bot_skill_assignment`. Per-skill `provider` is available via the plural `botyard_skills` data source (`provider` is a reserved attribute name at a data source's root).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Resolve a single skill's id from its slug, then assign it to a bot.
data "botyard_skill" "email_helper" {
  slug = "email-helper"
}

resource "botyard_bot_skill_assignment" "example" {
  bot_slug  = botyard_bot.example.slug
  skill_ids = [data.botyard_skill.email_helper.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `slug` (String) URL-safe slug of the skill to look up.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `file_count` (Number) Number of files in the skill.
- `id` (String) Unique skill identifier (UUID). Use this as `skill_ids` in `botyard_bot_skill_assignment`.
- `name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `scope` (String) Visibility scope (e.g. `org`, `platform`).
- `summary` (String) Brief description of the skill.
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp (RFC 3339).
